title: rosa indica var. pumila
intro: Rosa indica var. pumila, also known as Dwarf Indian Rose or Indian Dwarf Rose, is a compact and fragrant variety of rose that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa indica var. pumila include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
